---
title: "Resources & Hints"
description: "Useful information for students working on their bachelor project or master thesis."
description-meta: "Resources and hints for students - Peter Kapec, PhD"
title-block-banner: false
---
## How-to

- Work on your [**bachelor project**](bachelor-project.qmd)
- Work on your [**master thesis**](master-thesis.qmd)

## Resources

Search for relevant books, papers, proceedings, conferences etc. using:

- [**CiteSeerX**](https://citeseerx.ist.psu.edu/){target="_blank"} — scientific literature digital library
- [**ACM Portal**](https://dl.acm.org/){target="_blank"} — ACM Digital Library
- [**IEEE**](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/){target="_blank"} — IEEE Xplore Digital Library
- [**Google Scholar**](https://scholar.google.com/){target="_blank"} — broad academic search engine
- [**Wikipedia**](https://www.wikipedia.org/){target="_blank"} is **NOT** considered a trustworthy resource!!! (just for introduction to problematics)

## Writing Documentation

- Use LaTeX ([**MikTeX**](https://miktex.org/){target="_blank"}, [TexLive](https://www.tug.org/texlive/){target="_blank"}, etc.)
- [**LaTeX template**](files/latex_template.zip) — download template for thesis documentation
- Store and manage citations in BibTeX using e.g. [**JabRef**](https://www.jabref.org/){target="_blank"}
